params.name: Centipede Potion
params.description: The thousand-year centipede, with its formidable exterior and lethal poison, has become the subject of rumors about an elixir that grants immortality. As a result, numerous bounty hunters with varying levels of skill and immense courage have embarked on a perilous journey to find it.
